Home�Services�Compliance� SOC 2
Compliance

SOC 2 Readiness
& Certification

SOC 2 certification has become a prerequisite for B2B SaaS, cloud services, and technology companies. Our practice guides organizations through the complete SOC 2 lifecycle � from initial readiness assessment through successful Type II audit.

Certification That Opens Doors

Enterprise customers increasingly require SOC 2 certification as a condition of doing business. The certification demonstrates that your organization maintains effective controls over security, availability, processing integrity, confidentiality, and privacy � providing the trust assurance that accelerates sales cycles and removes procurement objections.

Our SOC 2 practice combines deep knowledge of the Trust Services Criteria with practical implementation experience. We help organizations design and implement controls that satisfy auditor requirements while remaining operationally sustainable � avoiding the trap of paper-only compliance that collapses under scrutiny.

Capabilities

  • SOC 2 readiness assessment against applicable Trust Services Criteria
  • Control gap identification and prioritized remediation planning
  • Security policy and procedure development aligned to SOC 2 requirements
  • Technical control implementation and configuration guidance
  • Evidence collection process design for continuous compliance
  • Audit firm selection advisory and engagement coordination
  • Type I and Type II audit preparation and dry-run testing
  • Remediation support for identified gaps during audit
  • Annual SOC 2 maintenance and continuous monitoring program

Who We Serve

SaaS and cloud service providers seeking their first SOC 2 certification. Technology companies whose enterprise customers are requiring SOC 2 reports. Organizations preparing for Type II after achieving Type I. Companies that failed a SOC 2 audit and need remediation guidance.

Trust Service Criteria

  • Security (Common Criteria)
  • Availability
  • Processing Integrity
  • Confidentiality
  • Privacy

Begin Certification

Start with a readiness assessment to understand your path to SOC 2.

Request Assessment
